allow: Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "CREATE TABLE user_profiles \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE UNIQUE, experience TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''beginner'', familiarity TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ''{}'', markets TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT ''{}'', goal TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''learning-basics'', time_commitment TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''casual'', onboarding_completed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\)\)")
Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "ALTER TABLE user_profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY")
Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "CREATE POLICY ""users_own_profile"" ON user_profiles FOR ALL USING \(user_id = auth.uid\(\)\) WITH CHECK \(user_id = auth.uid\(\)\)")
Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "CREATE TRIGGER user_profiles_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON user_profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION system.update_updated_at\(\)")

Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "CREATE TABLE user_learn_progress \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE, topic_id TEXT NOT NULL, topic_title TEXT NOT NULL, topic_category TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''started'', completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\), UNIQUE\(user_id, topic_id\)\)")
Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "ALTER TABLE user_learn_progress ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY")
Bash(npx @insforge/cli db query "CREATE POLICY ""users_own_progress"" ON user_learn_progress FOR ALL USING \(user_id = auth.uid\(\)\) WITH CHECK \(user_id = auth.uid\(\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 42584 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess")
